purpose: Analyze IAM trust chains and privilege escalation paths across AWS or Azure to surface cross-account access risks.
description: Maps IAM trust relationships, role-chaining paths, and privilege escalation vectors. Use for: IAM trust chain, role chaining, privilege escalation paths, cross-account access risks, assume-role reachability, Azure RBAC privilege escalation. NOT for general IAM security audit (use iam_security_audit for that).
capabilities: map IAM role trust relationships and assume-role reachability across an AWS account
detect privilege escalation paths through IAM role chaining
identify cross-account access risks and transitive trust vulnerabilities
analyze Azure RBAC role assignments for privilege escalation vectors
context_descriptions: IAM trust graph — all IAM roles, trust policies, and assume-role relationships
privilege escalation paths — role chaining sequences that elevate permissions
cross-account trust — external account IDs that can assume roles in this account
Azure RBAC assignments — role definitions and managed identity bindings
